verses.text: Bangmah phattuamnapi a om khollo ahi zongin ka kisialsial lai ding hi. Tu-in Topa in maang hong muhsakna leh ka muhte ka hong gen ding hi
Tuma kum sawmleli hun lai-in vantung a dawl tungnung penah Khristian khat kilato hi. A pumpi taktak hiam, maangmu ahi hiam ka thei kei hi. Pasian in thei hi
Tua mipa pen Paradais-ah a om ahi hi. A pumpi taktak tawh ahi hiam, maangmu ahi hiam ka thei kei a, Pasian in thei hi
Mite kiangah genkhiatsawn dingin a kiphallo a lamdang mahmah thu a za hi

Tua bang thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hinapi-in ka kisialhpih kei hi. Kei a ginalo hinapi ama minthan'na dingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu pen a kisialh taak mahmah thu hinapi-in ka kisialhpih kei hi. Kei a ginalo hinapi ama minthan'na dingin Pasian in hong zang ahih manin tua thu ka kisialhpih bek hi

Hih ka muh thu pen thuman ahih manin a kisialhpih hi ta leng zong mihai ka hi kei hi. Ahi zongin mite in keima sepna leh keima genna a muh a zak banah a valin hong thupi ngaihsutkhak ding uh utlo ka hih manin hih thu ka kisialhpih nuam kei hi

Ahi zongin hih a lamdang na tampite ka muhna hangin kisialin ka kisaktheih khaklohna dingin Satan' sawltak bangin na a sem, keima pumpi sungah natna khat hong kipia ahih manin ka kisaktheih luatlohna dingin a hong kham hi
Tua natna tawh ka kipelh theihna dingin Topa kiangah thumvei tak thu ka ngen hi

Ahi zongin Topa in kei kiangah, “Na tha a nem ciangin keima vangliatna hat mahmah ahih manin nangma kisap na pen keima hehpihna hi bek hi,” ci-in hong dawng hi. Tua ahih manin keima sungah Khrih vangliatna hong omtheihna dingin lungdam takin ka thaneemna ka kisialhpih semsem hi
Kei ka thaneem mahmah laitakin a thahat mahmah suak ka hih manin Khrih hangin ka thaneemna, simmawh ka thuakna, haksatna leh bawlsiatna leh lungkhamna ka thuaknate tawh ka lung a kim mahmah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul in Korin Pawlpite A Lunghihmawhna

verses.text: Note in kei a hong pakta ding hinapi-in hong paktalo na hih manun note' bawlin mihai bangin kisialin ka gamta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen bangmahpi ka hihloh hangin sawltak thupi mahmahin na ngaihsutte uh sangin themkhat zong ka neuzaw tuan het kei hi
Sawltak man taktak ka hihna lim a kilangsak nate, note lakah lungduai takin hong kisem a, lim, na lamdang, leh na a tuamtuamte note lakah hong kibawl hi

Note lakah na ka sepna hangin huhna bangmah kong ngetloh cih simloh, pawlpi dangte sangin kong hamsiatsak zawkna bangmah om hetlo hi. Tua bangin note kiang panin bangmah kong ngetlohna hangin midang tawh hong kibangsak lo suak ka hih manin, tua khialhna hong maisak ta un

Tu-in kong hawhna ding pen a thumveina ding hita a, note' gimna dingin bangmah ka hong ngen het kei ding hi. Keima deih pen note' sumlepaite hiloin note mahmah na hi uh hi. A taktakin ci lehang, tate in nulepate a huhding hilo a, nulepate in tate a huhding hizaw hi

Note ka hong huhtheihna dingin lungdam takin ka neih khempeuh kong piaknop banah keima pumpi mahmah zong ka hong kipia nuam hi. Tuazah takin ka hong itna pen itlohna tengin hong nei zawsop ding na hi uh hiam

Sumlepai vai-in note themkhat zong ka hong gimsak hetlohna na theihsa uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in, kei pen ngian zangin khemna tawh a lamdang khatah sum tamzaw ka ngahna ding a vaihawmin hong gen uh hi
Note kiangah ka hong paisak mite tung tawnin note kiang panin keima hamphatna ding bang la ka hi hiam

Note kiangah Titus a hong paina ding ka hahsawl a, amah tawh a kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh zong ka hong paisak hi. Titus in nuamtaksa-in note tungah bang hong ngen zenzen ahi hiam? Kote in lungsim kibangin na semin ka kalsuanna zia uh zong a kibang hilo ahi hiam

Note mai-ah ka mawhna uh a kiphelphel bang khatin na hong ngaihsutkhak uh leh tua bang hilo hi. Lawmte aw, ka hihna khempeuh uh note' phattuamna ding ka deihna uh tawh Khrih in kote' gen ding a hong deih bangin Pasian' mai-ah thu genin nasem ka hi uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong tun' ciangin note' omzia ding ka deih bangin na omloh khakding uh leh note in keima maisuah na muhnopzia bangun na hong muhloh khakding uh ka lunghimawh hi. Note lakah kitotna, hazatna, hehna, huaihamna, mi zahpihna, mi gensiatna, kiphatsakna, leh buaina a omkhak ding ka lunghimawh hi

Note kiangah ka hong tun' ciangin a beisa hunah note tampi tak thangtatin, numei tawh mawhna, hukna, lannate hangin na khialhnate uh na kisikloh manun keimah dahin kapin, note' muhna-ah ka Pasian in kei hong maizumsak khakding ka lunghimawh mahmah hi.
